heading: Parades, assemblages, and display of flags in the Supreme Court Building and grounds
label: 6135 Parades, assemblages, and display of flags in the Supreme Court Building and grounds
text: It is unlawful to parade, stand, or move in processions or assemblages in the Supreme Court Building or grounds, or to display in the Building and grounds a flag, banner, or device designed or adapted to bring into public notice a party, organization, or movement.
